task: Add the next Pro graph interaction slice: make graph nodes selectable in the Rust web shell, show the selected node in a graph inspector with confidence, evidence links, and challenge links, keep state browser-local only, and synchronize Pro docs/evidence. Do not add persistence, provider calls, or OSS runtime changes.
securityRequirements: Mention auth, secrets, permissions, and sensitive-data handling explicitly.
dependencyRequirements: Mention new or upgraded packages, lockfile changes, and dependency impact explicitly.
performanceRequirements: Mention performance, latency, or load impact in evidence.
understandingRequirements: Explain the main tradeoffs so future maintainers can follow the change.
continuityRequirements: Mention reuse targets and any deliberate continuity break in evidence.
